steps.title: Read Lion votes from the table
steps.content: From the Lion row, the Total column shows 20 students voted for Lion. There are 80 total students.

steps.title: Calculate the probability
steps.content: $$P = \frac{20}{80}$$ Divide numerator and denominator by 20: $$\frac{1}{4}$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
